headline: Wolfspeed Targets High Voltage Growth With Gen 5 SiC And GE Alliance
summary: Wolfspeed (NYSE:WOLF) introduced its fifth-generation silicon carbide MOSFET technology, targeting higher efficiency and performance in automotive and industrial power systems. The company also announced an alliance with GE Aerospace to speed up adoption and standardization of high-voltage silicon carbide across advanced industrial and aerospace markets. For readers following power semiconductor trends, Wolfspeed focuses on silicon carbide devices that sit at the heart of electric vehicles,...
